title: Location
doc_html:
§3087.112.  Location

The district shall be comprised of all of Concordia Parish, to  include precincts 4-6, 5-3, 5-4, 5-5, 5-6, and 5-7.

Acts 1999, No. 588, §1; Acts 2014, No. 207, §1.
